aboutText:
CPCS is Cal Poly's hub for all things Counter-Strike. We provide a community for all players, both casual and competitive! 

Join our discord for more info! https://discord.gg/PkPnZWmWAA

Contact me directly: clhafer@calpoly.edu

aboutText:
Gender-Inclusive Gaming is a community that supports minorities who are interested in gaming as a leisure activity! We have a community of people in our club Discord. Our club is a hybrid entity that boasts both Discord and in person meetings!


GIG has two Discords: a larger one that works to create a safe space to connect gamers across campus, and a smaller one with activity restrictions that aims to foster social connection. We host Game Nights and PowerPoint Nights in meetings where we allow individuals to share their personal interests! We welcome all identities, including neurodivergent, non-cis and queer individuals. Our only requirement is to abide by the club conduct found in our Discord(s)!

aboutText:
## We're **SLOLERS**!
As Cal Poly's League of Legends club, we host a wide variety of events from casual pick-up games to fierce collegiate esports matches. Whether you're just getting into the vast world of Runeterra or want to claw your way to the LCS, there's something for you!

We have __**two**__ tiers of competitive teams, D1 and D2, to accommodate players of all skill levels looking to get started in esports! Looking for fame a little more local? Our annual intramural tournament, __**SLOLCS**__, runs every Winter Quarter! Enter solo or with a duo, get matched onto teams, and battle to prove who's the best Summoner in San Luis Obispo!

[Get connected with us on Discord!](https://discord.gg/VBSaTxu)

aboutText:
Welcome to the Cal Poly SLOverwatch Club! We are dedicated to both casual and competitive gaming for Overwatch 2. For those that are competitively inclined, we have collegiate teams that compete year-round and various in-house matches and tournaments. For those that enjoy more casual gaming, we host weekly play-days, and just having a fun time in voice chat!

## Getting Involved

We offer multiple ways for members to get involved. If you would like to help with planning and running events, feel free to reach out to anyone on board! We always welcome others input and ideas. If you are more interested in joining our competitive teams, we host tryouts quarterly and recruit year-round, so keep an eye out for those announcements! You can find our current competitive teams [here](/teams).

## Links

You can join our Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/nrBXphM3), and you can join our organization at our [Cal Poly NOW](https://now.calpoly.edu/actioncenter/organization/cpsloverwatch/) page.
